equipment_type.description: Repurposed hollow-point rounds that burst into a puff of nanobots on hard impact or leak them into softer targets after entry. The rounds do not penetrate armor; the payload simply continues after the surface argument is over.
equipment_type.strategy_tip_optional: Increases Combat Power and Intimidation. Physical attacks apply Grey Goo, which stacks, deals damage over time, persists for normal combat durations, and spreads to nearby enemies when a target dies.
